name: HRA Exemption Calculator India

before.shortDescription: Calculate monthly and annual HRA exemption using salary, HRA received, rent paid, and city rate rules.
before.metaDescription: Calculate HRA exemption in India using salary, HRA received, rent paid, and metro or non-metro city rules.

after.shortDescription: Calculate your monthly and annual HRA exemption in India using salary, HRA received, rent paid, and city type. Get an estimate of your taxable HRA.
after.metaDescription: Estimate your HRA exemption in India with RupeeKit's calculator. Input salary, HRA, rent, and city to understand potential tax savings. For...
